entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Unmanaged scenario example-Simplified
entry.content:
@Andre_Fischer   Thanks for your valuable opinion. Totally agree Unmanaged is the next option after Managed with Unmanaged Save.

 

@Sandra_Rossi  Thought of Code collection is very small. Might be User can just see and write the code help them to practice more. In case of lots of line of code definitely will give the code snippet.

 

Thanks,

Anjan Paul

entry.title: Re: How to call standard Fiori application in Mobile appl...
entry.content:
As stated before, SAP Mobile Start supports exposed apps & content from SAP S/4HANA On-Premise, but only using "SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition". You cannot connect SAP Mobile Start directly to your On-Premise system without the SAP BTP, since "SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition" or "SAP Start" contain the required technical prerequisites for SAP Mobile Start to function correctly, for example Onboarding & Login using your Identity Provider or sending push notifications to the app. The previous links to the documentation and learning journey do contain all the necessary information to get you up and running.

At the moment, SAP Mobile Start cannot be used with "SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced Edition", but it is planned for the future. I would recommend to follow the public roadmap of SAP Mobile Start:
https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800003452&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=CD32A70058A51EDF89966A5E7E71471C

If you have more questions or want to get in touch with our product management team, you may reach out to sapmobilestart@sap.com via E-Mail.

entry.title: Re: Inter Company IDOC error processing "Charactersistic...
entry.content: Is the message number KE0C133? Please double click msg and check your long text.

entry.title: Re: Display error Quartz theme
entry.content:
Try to upgrade to latest version of SAPGUI.

Moving from SAPGUI 800 (64bits) PL6 to PL8 I was able to fix the issue.

entry.title: Re: Jobs running by FFID
entry.content:
Hi @Sankar_Aravind 

I do not know of any technical controls to prevent this, so I suggest you:

  1. Train the people using the FireFighter ID's, so they use a dedicated system user on the step for the background jobs
  2. Periodically do housekeeping to verify that all background jobs run in context of the proper system user
  3. Correct jobs that are found to have the FF ID on the step by using the report BTC_MASS_JOB_CHANGE according to 1532884 - Mass changes of jobs - SAP for Me

/Peter

entry.title: Adding purchase requisition to componentlist of process order
entry.content:
Dear experts,
I am quite new to the community since this is my very first post!

I'm having requirement changing components in componentlist of process order and connecting with created purchase requisiton.
For changing I'm allready using 'CO_XT_COMPONENT_CHANGE' but I dont see how I am able to add created purchase requistion and its positions afterwards to corresponding components.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Signavio - While uploading Attribute file data is getting repeated for CASE ID
entry.content:
Hi,

We have development data extractor and creating Log file and attribute file for data related to Project definition and WBs elements.

Case ID is with refence to Project Definition

 Project Definition is Created and then Released. So we have captured these as events. And also captured these 2 status in attribute file in different rows. 

In Log file we have 2 event rows with reference to 1 case ID as Created and Released

In Attribute file also we have capture Status information in 2 rows with 1 case ID as CRTD and REL

After uploading Log file and attribute file data maintained in attribute file not getting loaded as per file with status's given in attribute file as CRTD and REL. We suppose to get 2 rows with status as CRTD and REL against the case id.

But signavio is repeating data from CRTD status row and not updating data of REL. In data view against case ID we are getting 2 rows with CRTD status.

Can i get some view / guidance on this issue.

Also want to know can we have multiple rows for case ID or we should have unique row for case ID ?

In my case it is not possible to capture all required data in attribute file in unique row against case ID so we are creating multiple rows against single case ID. 

Regards,

Pradeep

entry.title: Unable to access some reports due to currency/unit conversion error.
entry.content:
Error: Database returned the SQL code 719. Error text: currency/unit conversion error: search table error: Conversion( "COL$1$", "COL$5$" ).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to access some reports due to currency/unit co...
entry.content: Refer SAP KBA 3367932 Unable to access Apps/Reports due to currency/unit conversion error https://me.sap.com/notes/3367932/E

entry.title: It is possible to have a Sandbox Server on SAP RISE for 6-9 months?
entry.content:
I have a customer that wants to convert from SAP ECC6 on HANA to S/4HANA. We want to implement, test and document most of the work in a sandbox server (copy of Production), then repeat everything in their Dev, QA and Prod systems.

For this, we will need a Sandbox server in SAP RISE for 6-9 months. Is it possible to provision a server on this basis?

The SAP Account Executive we are talking to says that it isn't - and they they will need to provision a server until the end of the current contract (which ends in September 2027!).

entry.title: condition type to be displayed in the sales order and invoice but not in the credit memo, debits
entry.content: There is a Requirement that a specific condition value for the condition type to be shown/ calculated in the sales order and invoice but not in the credit memo, debit memo and returns

entry.title: RFC and BAPIs Working Slow at MII Workbench
entry.content:
Hello community,

We're using MII Workbench 15.2.3.0 at our company. We're trying to send production confirmation with using BAPI_REPMANCONF1_CREATE_MTS to SAP from MII workbench. As you can see in the Appendix, we started with an Action block (Sequence95 - start_2) and in that we added our SAP server connection parameters.

Then in Sequence96 - SAP_JCo_Function_0, we used BAPI_REPMANCONF1_CREATE_MTS and filled the request columns with our values. Then used BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT at Sequence97-SAP_JCo_Function_1.

We also used RFC at Sequence_107 in the same transaction.

When we run this transaction, it works but it works really slow. For sending one record to SAP from MII, it takes 10 seconds approximately. We have to send 100 records in like 5 minutes so this is not good for us. Is there any way to speeding up this RFC / BAPI processes ? Is MII Workbench limiting us ?

Thanks,

entry.title: block edit Customer Name after Customer Creation
entry.content:
Hi All

How is it possible to block User edit Customer Name after Use has created the Customer in Business Partner Master Data?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content:
I believe, In standard system its not possible. Please check the below 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2551191/E

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-plan-the-dependent-requirements-in-the-same-mrp-area-as-header/qaq-p/644505

Regards,

Kumar

entry.title: Re: RAP Create button still enabled after disabling the f...
entry.content:
@ui.createHidden should be available from ABAP Cloud release 2302 and S/4 HANA OP 2023. If you say you are getting a syntax error when trying to use the annotation, you are probably on an older release. Unfortunately there is no other workaround from RAP or ABAP CDS at the moment, as this behavior is controlled by Fiori Elements, perhaps you could open a ticket with FE and they may have suggestions.

Regards,
Jessie

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content:
Hi There,

New members who don’t join a group and participate as outlined in tutorials will be unable to blog on the site.

you need to complete the tutorials https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/community-2024.html

All other information and prerequisites are mentioned in the tutorials.

Thanks & Regards,
Arafat Ajmal.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA direct connectivity with Event Mesh in Integration Suite
entry.content:
With the latest release of Event Mesh as a capability of SAP Integration Suite, it is possible to configure SAP S/4HANA to directly send events to EMIS (Event Mesh in Integration Suite).  

This post covers the details of how you can configure this integration. 

Prerequisites:  

You have SAP Integration Suite, and you have activated Event Mesh as a capability. 

Creation of a Queue on EMIS 

For more details on Queue creation, kindly refer to this doc.   

Creation of a topic subscription  

Next, create a topic subscription.  

For S4 integration, it is important to note that the topic name should correspond to the topic space defined in S4. Kindly note the asterisk (*) in the topic name which acts as a wildcard for the topic hierarchy.  
 
For more details, kindly refer to this doc.   

Creation of a service key for EM messaging client 

The service key is needed to get the credentials for S4 to connect to EMIS. For more details, kindly refer to this doc.  
 
Kindly create the service key post successful creation of service instance.  

Creation of SM59 destination on S/4  

S/4HANA needs details such as hostname and port to connect to EMIS. These details are specified in the sm59 destination.   

Kindly execute the following transaction: 
 
/nsm59  

Choose ‘Create’  

Provide a destination name and choose connection type as ‘HTTP connection to external server’ 

Save. 
 
Now, refer to the service key created using SAP Integration Suite, Event Mesh – ‘message client’ instance.  

You need to refer to this service key to provide the details in the sm59 destination. 


The hostname can be obtained from the ‘uri’ section under ‘messaging’ 
 
The port should be ‘443’ and path prefix ‘/protocols/amqp10ws’ for AMQP. (the first release of EMIS only supports AMQP protocol for messaging)  

In the logon and security tab, set ‘SSL’ to ‘Active’ as shown below -  

Save.   

Creation of Oauth client for S4  

S4HANA authenticates with EMIS using Oauth2.0.  

You need to execute the below transaction:  

/nOA2C_CONFIG  

Choose ‘Create’ and provide the necessary details. 
 
The OAuth2.0 Client Profile as shown above needs to be ‘IWXBE/MGW_MQTT’ even for AMQP based messaging.  

You can provide any configuration name, the Oauth 2.0 client ID can be found from the service key created above under the ‘oa2’ section in ‘messaging’.   

Choose OK. 
 
Provide the client secret, authorization and token endpoint from the service key.   

The authorization endpoint is not directly provided in the service key, but it is same as the token endpoint, except that it ends with ‘/authorize’ as show below.  

The Access Settings are mentioned below: 
 
Client Authentication: Form Fields  

Resource Access Authentication: Header Field  

Selected Grant Type: Client Credentials 
 
For complete details on configuring the Oauth client, kindly refer to this doc.  

Creation of a channel using form fields on S/4  

Kindly execute the below transaction to configure the channel: 
 
/n/IWXBE/CONFIG  

 
Create a new channel (without service key).  

At this point, it is not possible to configure this using the ‘Create Channel via Service Key’ option.   

This is currently a gap and will be addressed in an upcoming release. Please refer to SAP Note 3461547 for any updates.  

Choose ‘Default’ or ‘SAP Event Mesh’.  

Now the following details need to be provided –  


You can provide any name to the channel.  

The destination needs to be the name of the sm59 destination as created above.  

The topic space needs to correspond to the topic subscription on the Queue.  

The Oauth 2.0 Configuration needs to be the name of the Oauth2.0 client configuration as created above.  

Save.   

Activation of Channel & Connectivity Check  

Click on ‘Activate’ followed by ‘Check Connection’ to ensure that connection to Event Mesh is successful.  

Sending a Test Event using Event monitor  

Kindly execute this transaction,  

/n/IWXBE/EEE_SUPPORT  

Choose ‘Produce Test Events’ followed by the channel.  

Execute the transaction.  

You can now navigate back to Event Mesh in Integration Suite, head over to the Queues section and find the message queued! (unless there is active consumer)  

 

Congratulations – You have succeeded in integrating SAP S/4HANA with Event Mesh in Integration Suite!

entry.title: Re: BusinessObjects 4.3 SP4 - Patch 2/3/4/5 Issues
entry.content:
We just moved from SP02 to SP04 a week ago 

Regarding each of your points

1) I would be interested in understanding this change in behaviour - can you elaborate further please?

2) If Auto-merge dimensions is not selected under Data Options, then this is a bug. I've done a quick test on efashion and it is working as expected. Perhaps only an issue with existing webis?

3) Again, very serious if this is happening - perhaps it is a specific scenario - copying variables or changing data source?

 

regards

James

entry.title: Re: Story report Duplicate records Issues
entry.content: Is the duplication due to 'Other Ratings' returning more than one User ID? If this is the case you could create a calculated column that checks this (IF formula) and add a query filter to exclude one of the IF statements.

entry.title: Re: AGING REPORT FOR ACCOUNTS PAYABLE IS NOT WORKING IN S...
entry.content:
Hi Anj,

One possible reason is that the user has not been synchronized from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to the embedded SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) system. You can kindly refer to the KBA below to synchronize the user: 2978817 - It seems your profile is not configured for this system - Embedded Analytics not working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me.

If that does not work, you can also check other possible reasons in this KBA: 3305548 - How to resolve "It seems your profile is not configured for this System. Please contact your system administrator or end this session and try again later" error in Embedded SAC? - SAP for Me

Best regards,

Sharon

entry.title: Re: How to do data modelling of 200+ plus tables in IDT i...
entry.content:
200 tables is a lot, but the universe can handle it.

There is no shortcut here - adding the joins manually is the only way to go.

It enhances your understanding of the underlying datasets and establishes the way that the universe interacts with your data 

I wouldn't add all 200 tables in one go. Start slowly with the large transactional tables (fact tables)

Test as you go by building webi reports to ensure data integrity

If this is your first universe, then find a Business Objects consultant - you will have to live(suffer) with your early design decisions

James

entry.title: Re: Date not grouped in story with Datasphere model
entry.content: Thanks for the answer. I have managed to create the SAP DS Time and Date dimension, but what I can't get my model to take the hierarchy to SAC. I have a table where I have included the association by the ERDAT field. I also made the association in the SQL View using the association field and also joining it in the SQL query. But none of this is working for me to get the hierarchy to appear in SAC. would you know what step I am missing? Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: BTM TMS Transports - SLP_CTS: Error during client cre...
entry.content:
Hi Fernando,

I was able to get it to work today. Below are my observations

1) User Account had multiple SIDs
My CTMS instance was deploying to CloudFoundry using a destination that was configured with OAuthPassword auth method with a test user account that was a global account which was associated with multiple SIDs

 

2) Updated user account to one that was associated with a single SID
When I updated the account to another one that was again a global account that was associated with a single SID. With this change, the deployment was successful

3) Will use a technical user 
Our team will be provisioning a technical user and updating our destinations to this new user will be our next step.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hi Priya,
In onPrem it works similar, but you need to do the configuration in SPRO. You can find the corresponding documentation here.
best regards,
Christian

entry.title: delivery indicator for completed Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

 

Scenario: -1We have an issue with delivery indicator which is already setup for purchase order after completed delivery or certain tolerance limit is triggered the delivery indicator should automatically get trigger. 

However, some of the PO line items and some PO does not trigger the delivery indicator even though after completed the delivery in the system which causing issue to steer other processes for hundreds of Purchase orders. 

 

  

 

Scenario: - 2 

When PO created between intercompany process  

e.g :- Company A created PO and Company B received Purchase order and did entire cycle to forward the goods. 

However, Company A did not receive the material or some sort of mistake that happened at company  end to update in the system inbound delivery quantity entered as Zero which makes issue for delivery indicator to trigger for line items .What would be the ideal way to deal those line items to remove as uncompleted items and have delivery indicator.

entry.content:
Hi @Fatima_imdary1 ,

Regards,

David

entry.title: CPI RFC SCC : An internal server error
entry.content:
Error Details
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?><rfc:ZSDFU011.Exception xmlns:rfc="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions"><Name>read: Connection broken for conversation ID [00000000] when trying to read SCC header</Name><Text>read: Connection broken for conversation ID [00000000] when trying to read SCC header</Text><Message> <ID/>

entry.title: Re: Create data using Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchron...
entry.content: Hello Lina, if use the Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) api, there is no amount field in that api and we cannot add the amount field as in screen which I shown in above. So, is there any other api or other ways from external system that I can create data of Post Incoming Payment to system. Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: CAP: How can I add custom query options in my custom handler?
entry.content:
In case anyone else has the same problem, you can select older/invalid entries by suppressing the temporal aspect using annotations. Somewhere in the change logs I found this:

  • Generation of temporal WHERE clause can be suppressed by annotating the validFrom/validTo elements of the projection with false or null.

So by using a projection like this, I can finally retrieve all entries:

 

entity TransportFactors as projection on co2.TransportFactors {
        *,
        @(cds.valid.from: false)
        validFrom,
         @(cds.valid.to: false)
        validTo
    }

 

Would've been better if this was mentioned in the temporal documentation... 😒

entry.title: Re: How to assign a customer as partner for an intercompa...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check this path

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Blocking Reason
entry.content:
Hi,

According to my knowledge, there is no field named blocking reason on the purchase order.

Or could you please provide more details to show your question? Thanks.

Best Regards and Thanks.

entry.title: Re: condition type to be displayed in the sales order and invoice but not in the credit memo, debits
entry.content: Use the requirement routine and assign to that pricing condition

entry.title: Re: SAP MRP
entry.content:
Hi,

Hi

You can explore learning.sap.com com here are a lot of free training available by SAP.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model Edit Table
entry.content:
Hi @G_Misi,

I had the similar problem when I was creating custom page within the FPM. I was able to solve it by setting the isEditable property of global ui model that is available within FPM to true within the onAfterRendering method of the custom page.

onAfterRendering: function() {
    this.getModel("ui").setProperty("/isEditable", true);
},

I hope it helps.

Best regards,
Vladimir

entry.title: Re: Cannot add application to group in Business Work Zone standard edition
entry.content: I'm also facing the same issue, Let me know if you found a solution for this.

entry.title: How to clear the log files in Sap Customer Checkout Central server folder
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

Could anyone of you guys can advise us is there any option to clear log files in SAP - Customer Checkout Central Server - Logs  because usually these log files increasing almost in every 3 seconds and in one of our client servers size of those file gone more than 22 GB . So appreciate if you can let us know a better way to clear those logs if possible and further please tell what will be the impact to the system if the log has been cleared anyway .

Thanks in Advance .

Best Regards,

Tharindu.

SAP Customer Checkout  , SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: Child Entity Creation without update in RAP
entry.content:
What is the problem you are facing when you are using 'field(readonly:update)', Sorry am not able to make out the issue you are facing using the screenshots attached.

We have same Field Characteristics enable for couple of fields but in Root Entity and it works perfectly alright and we also have Draft functionality enabled, so wondering what problem you could be facing.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: SDK Version 1400 does not support Crystal Enterprise...
entry.content:
Hi Kishan,

Thanks for your support.

 

For upgrading purposes, we must purchase SAP Crystal Server 2020 (CS). Regretfully, we attempted to install a trial version of the software, and as a result, we discovered that the upgrade management tool (UMT) for SAP Crystal Server 2020 (CS) is not available. We then tried upgrading via PMT, but we were unsuccessful and received the issues mentioned above. I believe that configuring SAP Crystal Server 2020 (CS) is not the best option. Instead, we should purchase SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence(user), where can obtain PMT and UMT.
UMT will be used to process the upgrade to CR 2020.

 

Thanks

Ramesh

entry.title: Re: CAP: query historical data from entity with temporal aspect using association
entry.content: answer can be found in: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/cap-how-can-i-add-custom-query-options-in-my-custom-handler/qaq-p/13750983/comment-id/4835795#M4835795

entry.title: Re: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content: Hi, Based on my understanding of your question, you need to use two MRP areas for storage locations 0001 and 0002. After setting up the MRP areas, enter the Planned Independent Requirements (PIRs) for each MRP area, and then execute the MRP run for each MRP area. Regards

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Blocking Reason
entry.content: in SAP S4HANA there is a "VERSION" tab in PO Header where we can put blocking reason.

entry.title: Re: App Development Outsourcing: 7 Truths You Haven't Been Aware Of
entry.content: Very beautifully explained the app development truth. I am sure many of the people must have not thought about this.  Keep writing awesome posts.

entry.title: FAGL_FCV vs S_ALR_87012277
entry.content: I try to use tcode FAGL_FCV in our quality system to try and recreate a problem that our client is facing. I determine the accounts I want to use. However, no data is retrieved. But when I use tcode S_ALR_87012277 with the same selection of accounts, the data is there. Can anyone tell me if the comparaison I am making is correct? if so, why is the data not appearing in FAGL_FCV and if not, what should I compare with?

entry.title: Theme change with latest SAP UI5 version
entry.content:
We have designed a SAP UI5 application with the version 1.118.1. Recently when we upgraded the version of the SAP UI5 library to 1.125.1 we observed there were some CSS styling changes on the combo box, breadcrumbs and input fields. PDF attachment icon is also seen to be modified.

A blue color highlight was observed on combo box and input field elements on hover, background color of combo box and input fields is changed from grey to white & breadcrumbs styling is also different. We couldn't find this change as a part of release documentation.

I have attached images for reference on the changes observed!

Is this theme or styling change part of latest library releases?  If so, can someone provide the reference for the same on this change/solution?

entry.title: Re: 2024-07 Developer Challenge - Task 0 - Server and service provisioning
Re: How access restrictions work in a Project in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Hi, thanks for the blog. Somehow it doesn't work in our CALM. Private projects can still be edited by users how have just viewing rights and are not assigned. Is there some kind of "super role" which is not listed in the user management?

entry.title: Integration Suite (CPI) Synchronous Proxy with Attachment Error
entry.content:
Hello experts

I have the following integration scenario:

1. A synchronous proxy (service consumer) sends purchase order information, including a PDF as attachment to generic proxy dispatcher flow in the IS/CPI. Based on the header values of "SapInterfaceNamespace" and "SapInterfaceName" the processing flow is then called dynamically.

2. The processing flow extracts the attachment and puts it into a property which is thereafter cleared from the message (SAP note 3240138).

3. External REST APIs are called to process the message and also attach the PDF.

4. Based on the processing outcome, a success or failure is returned to the proxy call.

In generally, this works well, but sometimes the proxy call goes on error and the following "PART_BOUNDARY_NOT_FOUND" shows in SXMB_MONI:

In such a case, I see the following log in the proxy dispatcher flow:

Processing exchange ID-10a74212-bf95-45f5-46ff-fb9c-1719846917195-23-2626:
StartTime = Wed Jul 03 08:01:43.915 UTC 2024
StopTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024
ChildCount = 5
ModelStepId = MessageFlow_5
StepId = MessageFlow_5
Activities [
{Activity=sap-processdirect:foo?address=/${header.SapInterfaceNamespace}/${header.SapInterfaceName}, StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:01:43.915 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024}
]

Processing exchange ID-10a74212-bf95-45f5-46ff-fb9c-1719846917195-23-2626:
StartTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024
StopTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024
Status = COMPLETED
ChildCount = 6
ModelStepId = EndEvent_2
StepId = EndEvent_2
Activities [
{Activity=setProperty[SAP_MarkMessageAsFailed], StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.623 UTC 2024}
{Activity=Exchange ID-10a74212-bf95-45f5-46ff-fb9c-1719846917195-23-2626 completed, StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.629 UTC 2024}
]

Sent response from endpoint:
StartTime = Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024
Status = FAILED
ChildCount = 7
Cxf.EndpointAddress = /XiEntrySync
Error = Outbound processing in endpoint at /XiEntrySync failed with message "ClassCastException:java.lang.String (loaded by <bootstrap>) cannot be cast to java.lang.Integer (loaded by <bootstrap>)"
ModelStepId = MessageFlow_4
Activities [
{Activity=processEvent[SentResponse], StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024}
{Activity=log Fault, StartTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Jul 03 08:02:04.625 UTC 2024}
]

Nevertheless, I don't understand why this is happening once in a while but not all the time. When I look at the response payload from the processing flow back to the proxy dispatcher flow then they look exactly the same for the successful flow and the one in error.

Also, a boundary issue would also indicate some kind of issue with the attachment, but again it fails only once in a while when sending with the attachment and never when there's no attachment present.

Anybody having an idea what could be the issue or encountered the same and found a solution?

Thanks in advance,

Daniel

entry.title: Accesing SAP CPQ API Swagger documentation
entry.content:
Hi, Experts!

We have been trying to access the Swagger documentation for SAP CPQ's API for several days now (https://webcomcpq.com/webapihelp/index#/)

We always receive this error:

Has the API documentation been moved? According to several help pages, it should be active. For example, in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CPQ/08a7929ad06d4680b4f18cb57bc1a1d3/e25645791b7042859798804f8a7f1de4.html?locale=en-US 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Introduction
entry.content: Welcome and thank you for the introduction @SamCuypers !! If you haven't done so already, you might want to join the Brussels group and connect with members there like @WouterLemaire and others - Wouter is an SAP Mentor and expert. I'm not sure how far away you live in Belgium but perhaps there is a future opportunity for you to join an SAP Community event!

entry.title: Re: Open items check at settelment document creation
entry.content:
Hello Yacinemn,

This is standard system functionality. You can enable certain settlement document types for Credit management. In the configuration screen of the settlement document type under Settlement Management -> Settlement Documents ->Settlement Document Types - Settlement Document, there is a section "Credit Management". There are also configuration settings required in FSCM Credit management to fully enable the functionality.

Hope this helps.

Thanks!

entry.title: How to save result of com object method into table?
entry.content:
I've created a com object, and  i have method GetList wich should return me a list of values, but compiler says i cannot do it, is there are other ways to do it?

TYPES :
BEGIN OF ty_itab,
  id type id,
  str type string.
TYPES END OF ty_itab.
data : invlist type STANDARD TABLE OF ty_itab WITH HEADER LINE.

INCLUDE OLE2INCL.
DATA evat TYPE OLE2_OBJECT.
CREATE OBJECT evat 'EInvVatService.Connector'.
if sy-subrc <> 0.
  write: 'Error'.
endif.

CALL METHOD of evat 'GetList' = invlist exporting #1 = '2024-07-03T16:40:00'.

entry.title: Re: Eventos Presenciais de SAP - Ainda existe interesse?
entry.content:
Voltando ao temas...este ano 2024 temos vários eventos do SIT presenciais! Optimo.

 

Temos SP, Fortaleza, Recife!...

Acho que os poderiamos no inicio de cada ano marcar uma agenda conjunta para definir datas para as regiões/cidades que pretendam fazer o SIT (em especial o SIT pois envolve mais orçamento).

Com isso poderiamos ter datas acessiveis para que todos conhecessem e pudessem partilhar e era otimo para os sponsors que poderiam disponibilizar o orçamento entre varios meses. Normalmente temos sempre alguns Sponsors que patrocinam mais de um evento, e tanto o orçamento quanto a logistica para a participação, ficaria mais acessivel.

entry.title: sap FSM validation rule for mobile app
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to create a business rule of type Validation for the mobile app? The business requirement is that before checkout, the feedback code should be entered by the field service technician. Making the feedback codes on the feedback screen (ActivityFeedback Mobile) mandatory does not solve this requirement. Or is this possible via the Required Expression in field 'activity.feedbacks' in screen Activity Mobile?

Kind regards,

Jan-Adriaan

entry.content:
Hi,

Was wondering if it's possible to create new Semantic Objects in the public cloud edition , similar to using the transaction /UI2/SEMOBJ from the SAP GUI in the private cloud edition?

Thanks,

Rich

Welcome to the SAP Community! Feel free to join us at the SAP Inside Track Belgium: SAP Inside Track Belgium

entry.title: Re: Group checkout
entry.content: Hi @aziz96, OK, probably you can not access it as I copied it by chance from my personal site. Nevertheless, my explanation is the same: Please check in the checkout step of your workflow if the screen type is "Report" instead of "None". This solved the issue in my case. Best regards, Christoph

entry.title: Re: Child Entity Creation without update in RAP

@ankahit 

I think your draft table needs to have 'draftuuid' as a key field. Please find the link below:

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/754482eb5e624aada5d17696a6ab11b6.html

entry.title: Re: 2024-07 Developer Challenge - Task 0 - Server and service provisioning
entry.content:
Hello,

The service is up and running locally with Ngrok:

entry.title: Re: loadProcedure is not a function
entry.content:
Hi all, after some work I could solve this issue. Since I have not seen anything related I`m going to share what happend:

Somehow, whe I created the Node.js / XSJS module, it xsjs uses now this async-xsjs.

So, in my .xsjs I had to use an async function and the await to call the loadProcedure, or executeQuery functions.

As I`m in a rush I did not have time to stop and try to understand what changed but this was the solution to fix the issue.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2022 FPS1 Fully-Activated Appliance standard installation
entry.content:
Same issue with the hang I had two issues, one was using SUSE SLES15 the password for the user was supposed to be stashed using the keyring, saw in /var/log/messages that this was failing.

That looks like your issue:

syb_start_db_server_reset_sa_password.

Look in /var/log/messsages and you can see it looping trying to get the password from the keyring

Changed to use RHEL 9.2 but there received segment violation when running reset_sa which I have reported to support.

entry.title: Re: Input Parameter of Calculation View to Flowgraph
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

 

Did you get any solution for this ?

entry.title: Re: Configuring fiori apps without Business Roles
entry.content:
Keeping it for posterity. You should always create your custom BC (Business Catalog) as a copy of the standard one, and then operate only on this new one. Otherwise you wouldn't be able to adjust it later i.e. by changing its description, removing unwatend app or even adding a new one from a custom TC (Technical Catalog). That's the best practise. Refer https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_AS_ABAP_752/a7b390faab1140c087b8926571e942b7/af35d42e7d4f49d7b8e46080cd01c299.html?version=7.52.8&locale=en-US

Regards

Marcin

entry.title: CASE in WHERE query
entry.content:
Hello,

I created the query below. This works properly.

But I actually want the query to return only the lines that have the value WAAR.

What's the best way to do that? I don't think I can put the name of the column header in the WHERE section.

 

SELECT
T0.[ItemCode],
T0.[ItemName],
T1.[Price] as 'Inkoopprijs',
T0.[AvgPrice],
CASE WHEN T1.[Price] = T0.[AvgPrice] THEN 'WAAR' ELSE 'ONWAAR' END AS 'Gelijk?'

FROM
OITM T0 INNER JOIN ITM1 T1 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T1.[ItemCode]

WHERE
T1.[PriceList] = [%0] AND
T0.[InvntItem] = 'Y' AND
T0.[frozenFor] = 'N'

entry.title: Re: Custom Component, Part 2: How we built and shared tooltip component
entry.content:
@Dan_Wroblewski 
I assume the question refers to the 'share' feature, which has been changed lately. 

I have noticed as well, that the components no longer generate a 'share token', however, a user can click now on the 'Copy to clipboard' which is essentially a share token that can be pasted into the marketplace and then the target component would be available for installation. 


NOTE: this seems to be working, however as soon as the copied component that the user wants to install has more complex internal logic (using flow functions from the marketplace) or uses other non-default components (e.g. iframe) then it will throw the following error on component install: 

So whenever you install a new component with the 'Copy to clipboard' method, make sure to have every used flow / component installed prior to adding the new component to the canvas. 

I am confident that this will be solved in a future release of the Composer, but it is important to know about this limitation before creating complex custom components with internal logic. I always strongly advise using the pure and default flow functions, but that cannot always be the case.

entry.title: Re: SAC Hyperlink Filter Inheritance Between Two Stories...
entry.content: Using "NavigationUtils.openStory()" and a lot of logic to build the input parameters, I was able to create the wanted behaviour. Although with some limitations, since this function is essentially a fancy way of building a hyperlink and hyperlinks have a max character length of 2048.

entry.title: How to add a warning message when no value is obtained in condition type for taxes in purchase order
entry.content:
Hi gurus, 

I have been requested to add a condition type for tax determination when creating POs, this condition type has a sequence of 5 condition tables and I need to show a warning message when none of the tables have given a result (no condition has matched) and therefore the tax hasn't been calculated.

I have tried to search in spro in case it can be configured somewhere but haven't found anything, am I missing something? Does anyone knows a customer exit or BAdI to add this message after the validation?

Thanks, 

 

Álvaro.

entry.title: Re: Integration of OData in AIF & Monitoring in AIF

Hi, 

We are able to see only error logs in /AIF/ERR, but not the success ones. Is there any additional configuration to view success messages for standard Odata service AIF configuration?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project wizard error
entry.content:
For anyone facing the same Adaptation deployment issues from BAS, the Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3249073/E  contains some solutions to try. However in our case, the issue was missing Abap language version objects which was solved in by Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3365351/E  .

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Capacity planning Report
entry.content:
Hello All

Business is currently using CM01 for getting the capacity planning. Below are the challenges.

-The want to view capacity for all the work centers in a plant, so they are running CM01 just by giving plant, but CM01 can only read 5000 at time.

-Also CM01 shows Work center as header and then capacity details. So when excel is extracted business have to manually put work center in new column for all the different work center.

Is there any report in sap where i can just give plant and get the planning details along with work center as column and no restriction of output entries?

entry.title: loan replacement material in customer repair process
entry.content:
hello gurus

I am relatively new to this process so I need your help.

I checked online but could not find the steps for this scenario.

1) our customer is sending material to be repaired

2) During repair time, we send him substitute material on loan

3) when the customer material is repaired, we send him back his own material and recuperate the material we gave him on loan.

The steps are clear and the repair process works well, what I am not sure about is how to send and later recuperate the material we give to the customer on loan?

meaning, how do I send it, what movement/special stock do I use, how to return it?

entry.title: How to add all org levels for an employee in Query Manager 4?
entry.content: HI. I'm new to Query Manager 4 and trying to create my first report which would have info on an employee level, but need to include info to which organizational unit does an employee belong and also all upper org levels (e.g. employee XY belongs to department Marketing, but Marketing is under Services sector etc.)? How do I do that? Does this require merging different tables (PA,OM)? How is that done? Please consider that I am a complete newbie to SAP Query Manager.

entry.title: CM50 and CM01 capacity planning data not matching
entry.content:
Hello All

when i am executing CM01 and CM50 for the same work center i can see difference in required capacity. 

Eg. In planned order in detail scheduling tab there are 2 operation for that work center. One operation 0010 is have 0 capacity and other 0170 is have 5 hr capacity requirement.

In CM01 it shows capacity requirement as 5 hr just for 0170 operation while in CM50 it shows 10 hr (5 for 0010 and 5 for 0170).

 Any idea how this can be fixed.

entry.title: Re: activate IDOC service path in S4 for IDOC receiver co...
entry.content:
Hi Ramu, 

not sure if it is part of your setup or design, but usually there is a cloud connector in place to connect BTP with on premise network. Thus, there is no open port towards the internet which is mostly the reason for security/ network/ basis to refuse a connection from CI into S/4. 

Cloud connector is a piece of software typically installed in on premise DMZ and initiates a connection (like a tunnel) from on premise into SAP Cloud. Since that connection originates from on premise, no opening of firewall is required. 

 

SAP Help https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/connectivity

Example setup: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/use-sap-cloud-connector-sap-cloud-platform-java-to-consume-function-in-abap/ba-p/13367319 

(they have a custom app on BTP as example, that is comparable to CI in your case)

Best Regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: Lectures for SAP Inside Track PORTO 2024
entry.content:
Pre-alignment of lectures for SAP Inside Track Porto 2024.

Event on The Lodge Hotel - PORTO, on 28 SET 2024.

Sign up to participate in this SAP Portugal Community event

#SITPOR #SAPCommunity

 

Lectures for SAP Inside Track PORTO

Speaker

SAP Project: Technology Or Business?

António Andrade

SAP Build Work Zone Content Federation deep dive

Fabio Pagoti

Global eCompliance with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

Felipe Borges

SAP Implementation Change Management how to manage organizations and people

Marta Mota

People, Process and Technology as successful enablers for excellence in industrial operations

Tiago Fernandes

Gen AI

Bruno Costa

The era of Digitalization and Sustainability

Filipe  Silva

SAP IS Retail

André Margi

AI capabilities and data security issues

Abílio Cardoso

entry.title: Tarifnumbers from GTS
entry.content:
Hello 

We actually import the tarifnumbers with the program /SAPSLL/STAWN_RETRANSFER_R3 into our SAP ECC. The tarifnumbers are coming from our GTS. Now we are implementing the SAP S4 HANA and it looks like that this program does no longer exists. Does someone know how the tarifnumbers can be imported into the new SAP S4?

Many thanks
Urs

entry.title: How to save or retain data in Project IMG?
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know that how would I save the new entries in the Project Implementation guide, while I am required to create new entries for the Contract Field on Info-type 0001 to store the union affiliation of the employees?

When I press 'save' option to get save new entry data it pops up a window of 'Prompt for customizing request' which requires to fill out 'request field'.

What should I need to fill in the 'request field'?

And If I cancel this 'Prompt for customizing request window' and do not fill anything in 'request field' than I can not save new entries or data. Her are some screen shots of that window.

Can anyone help me with this to understand this process so that I can proceed my tasks.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to add a warning message when no value is obtaine...
entry.content: If code is required, look at the methods available in BAdI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST such as PROCESS_ITEM.

entry.title: SAC: Filter Multiple Dimension with One Input Field
entry.content:
Hello All,

In this blog, I wanted to show how you can filter multiple dimensions with one input parameter. The classical filtering works as adding filters for each dimension on report but with this effective way, you need only one input parameter and you can filter whole different dimensions individually with this input field.
the gif that below down shows how it works. There are three different dimensions on table and when I input a value and push the filter button, it filters the dimension that has contains my input so, no need to write whole data inside. Also there is no case sensitivity.



For example when I write an input as "Turk" , it detect that this input is contained in "Country" dimension as "Turkey" and then it filters country. When I write "Eur" it filters "Region" dimension at this time and also same for "soda" filters "Product Group" dimension.
The scripting is not working on dimensions with their name, it works with dimensions order. Therefore when I add a new dimension, it works for it too. I added three loops into the scripting so, it works for only first three dimensions. You can add loops as much as you want.

How to do it? (for only multiple filtering)
-Necessary Widgets: Table, Input Field , Button (* I filtered only table in this example you can add other widgets too as you wish)
-Scripting (You have to add scripting to only Button)

 

var INPUTTAKI_DEGER = InputField_1.getValue().toLowerCase();         
//get the value from input field into global variable  

var BOYUT1 = Table_1.getDimensionsOnRows()[0];
var BOYUT2 = Table_1.getDimensionsOnRows()[1];
var BOYUT3 = Table_1.getDimensionsOnRows()[2];
//get dimensions that you want to filter into local variables. for this case I used three dimensions. You can use more or less but if you will use more, you have to script more loops for every dimension.

Table_1.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter(BOYUT1);
Table_1.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter(BOYUT2);
Table_1.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter(BOYUT3);
// remove filters on dimensions. Also you can add a new "remove filters" button and use the scripting part up to here to remove all filters. 

if (INPUTTAKI_DEGER.length===0 )
	{return;}
//If there is no value inside input field, scripting will stop here and all filters will be deleted on these first 3 dimensions.  

//First Loop
var SECILENLER = Table_1.getDataSource().getDataSelections();
for (var i=0;i<SECILENLER.length;i++)
    {var Uyeler = Table_1.getDataSource().getResultMember(BOYUT1,SECILENLER[i]);
	 var buyuk_kucuk_harf_esiteleme = Uyeler.description.toLowerCase(); 
	 // With this for loop, every member in that dimension will be in variable "UYELER". last part gets the first dimension's descriptions into a variable "buyuk_kucuk_harf_esiteleme" as lowercase. 
	  
	 var ESAS_UYE = Uyeler.description;  
// ESAS_UYE variable will take the Original description value.
	 
if(buyuk_kucuk_harf_esiteleme.includes(INPUTTAKI_DEGER)) 
// this if condition checks if the input value is contained in a value from first dimension. if there is, condition will be applied. If there is not, it will goes to second loop
	
{ Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter(BOYUT1,ESAS_UYE);	
console.log(ESAS_UYE);
 return ;}}
// if the value in input is contained in first dimension, it filters table and stop scripting here. if it doesn't stop, this will work anyway but gives an error and works for nothing. 

//second Loop
var SECILENLER2 = Table_1.getDataSource().getDataSelections();
for (var a=0;a<SECILENLER2.length;a++)
    {var Uyeler2 = Table_1.getDataSource().getResultMember(BOYUT2,SECILENLER[a]);
	 var buyuk_kucuk_harf_esiteleme2 = Uyeler2.id.toLowerCase(); 
	  
	 var ESAS_UYE2 = Uyeler2.id;  
//I used ID here, for my case ids and descriptions are same but you can use necessary one in your case. id is better generally if you can choose it. 
	 
if(buyuk_kucuk_harf_esiteleme2.includes(INPUTTAKI_DEGER)) 
	
{Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter(BOYUT2,ESAS_UYE2);	
console.log(ESAS_UYE2);
 return ;}}
console.log(INPUTTAKI_DEGER);

//third Loop
var SECILENLER3 = Table_1.getDataSource().getDataSelections();
for (var e=0;e<SECILENLER3.length;e++)
    {var Uyeler3 = Table_1.getDataSource().getResultMember(BOYUT3,SECILENLER[e]);
	 var buyuk_kucuk_harf_esiteleme3 = Uyeler3.id.toLowerCase(); 
	  
	 var ESAS_UYE3 = Uyeler3.id;  

if(buyuk_kucuk_harf_esiteleme3.includes(INPUTTAKI_DEGER)) 


	{Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter(BOYUT3,ESAS_UYE3);
	 console.log(ESAS_UYE3);
	 return;}}

 

 

Summary

In this work,  I aimed to show you how to filter multiple dimension. With this way user can manage every dimensions with only one input field. 

When I was looking for analytic application examples, I saw a great blog from  @JBARLOW  and I wanted to add something on it. Therefore I got inspired from his work "Use a text search to filter a dashboard". Thanks.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA - filter requirements in MRP with MD_ADD_ELE...
entry.content:
Hello

Yes, MD_ADD_ELEMENTS is the direct replacement for MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA, and it is called in MD04 and Classic MRP.

As of SAP S/4HANA 2022 there is a new AMDP BAdI, which is called in Classic MRP, MRP Live, MRP Fiori Apps and MD04. Check this blog for details:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-2022-new-badi-to-influence-mrp-elements-in-mrp-live-and-classic/ba-p/13568425

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP BTP Document Management Service UI in the Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello Mahesh,

I have followed the same steps,here in destinations do we need to create the separate destination with oAuth in BTP.I have created that.The application is not working.getting authorise call back error while opening the app
